commands.repair_reason: Human review is needed because the external PR lacks real behavior proof and the remaining blockers are gateway auth/transport semantics rather than a safe automation-only repair.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a local gateway control-plane path before preserving the current credential, scope, timeout, and frame-normalization contracts.; Review finding: [P1] Register local dispatch on the resolver startup pat... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a local in-process gateway dispatch registry and makes agent gateway tool calls try it before falling back to WebSocket.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR regressions: source inspection shows the new local branch runs before current option, scope, timeout, and frame-normalization handling. The original embedded cron WebSocket timeout was supported by related issue logs but was not live-run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the external PR lacks real behavior proof and the remaining blockers are gateway auth/transport semantics rather than a safe automation-only repair.

target.title: fix: route embedded tool calls through in-process dispatch (#40237)
target.author: frankbuild
